# Route Inventory Baseline — server.py
# Generated by tests/_gen_route_inventory.py (read-only).
# Captures literal paths and prefixes referenced inside each HTTP handler
# at the time of generation. Each line is one of:
#   /exact/path          — handled by `path == "/exact/path"` or `path in (...)`
#   /prefix/*            — handled by `path.startswith("/prefix/")`
#   ~regex               — handled by re.match(r"^regex$") (^/$ stripped)
# This file is the BASELINE for Phase-0C safety-net. Modularization
# should not LOSE any line below; new modules should keep these visible.
